channel.title: xai_rss security feed
channel.description: Urgent security posts collected from trusted X accounts.

item.title: INCIBE Aviso: SQL Injection in Umami Software CVE-2026-4317
item.description: summary: Alert on SQL injection vulnerability in Umami Software, tagged as 0day with advisory link. canonical_author: @incibe_cert source_classification: official source_confidence: 95 source_reason: Government-affiliated national incident response center issuing formal advisories. urgency_reason: Zero-day disclosure by national CERT requiring immediate attention. cve_ids: CVE-2026-4317 vendors: Umami Software related_sources: - https://x.com/incibe_cert/status/2038896620662567224

item.title: INCIBE Aviso: Multiple Vulnerabilities in 1millionbot Millie Chat CVE-2026-4399, CVE-2026-4400
item.description: summary: Alert on multiple vulnerabilities in Millie chat application, tagged as 0day with advisory link. canonical_author: @incibe_cert source_classification: official source_confidence: 95 source_reason: Government-affiliated national incident response center issuing formal advisories. urgency_reason: Zero-day disclosure by national CERT requiring immediate attention. cve_ids: CVE-2026-4399, CVE-2026-4400 vendors: 1millionbot products: Millie chat related_sources: - https://x.com/incibe_cert/status/2038896043530535043

item.title: CloudSEK Warns of Instant Exploitation for Oracle WebLogic CVE-2026-21962 RCE
item.description: summary: Critical CVSS 10 RCE in Oracle WebLogic allows full server takeover; CloudSEK reports instant exploitation, patch now. canonical_author: @the_yellow_fall source_classification: other source_confidence: 75 source_reason: Established cybersecurity news outlet highlighting urgent threats. urgency_reason: Reported active/instant exploitation of maximum severity RCE in enterprise software. cve_ids: CVE-2026-21962 vendors: Oracle products: WebLogic related_sources: - https://x.com/the_yellow_fall/status/2038894063508656543

item.title: CareCloud EHR platform breach exposes patient data
item.description: summary: Healthcare SaaS CareCloud confirms 8-hour unauthorized access to one EHR environment on March 16; multi-tenant impact under investigation. canonical_author: @adityambasymbi source_classification: trusted_expert source_confidence: 85 source_reason: Certified expert with domain experience providing substantive incident analysis beyond basic reporting. urgency_reason: Confirmed breach in healthcare data aggregator potentially affecting multiple practices' patient records. vendors: CareCloud products: EHR, Electronic Health Records related_sources: - https://x.com/adityambasymbi/status/2038889489410527615

item.title: CISA Adds F5 BIG-IP RCE CVE-2025-53521 to KEV
item.description: summary: CISA confirmed active exploitation of critical 9.3 RCE in F5 BIG-IP APM, added to KEV; immediate patching urged. canonical_author: @buhaimedi source_classification: trusted_expert source_confidence: 80 source_reason: Certified cybersecurity professional providing detailed Arabic-language advisories. urgency_reason: CISA KEV addition with evidence of real-world exploitation and RCE impact. cve_ids: CVE-2025-53521 vendors: F5 products: BIG-IP APM related_sources: - https://x.com/buhaimedi/status/2038889036920525087

item.title: Critical RCE in EspoCRM 9.3.3 CVE-2026-33656
item.description: summary: EspoCRM Formula Engine flaw allows server takeover in six requests; detailed exploit walkthrough available. canonical_author: @the_yellow_fall source_classification: other source_confidence: 75 source_reason: Established cybersecurity news outlet highlighting urgent threats. urgency_reason: Critical RCE with public exploit details/PoC equivalent. cve_ids: CVE-2026-33656 vendors: EspoCRM products: EspoCRM 9.3.3 related_sources: - https://x.com/the_yellow_fall/status/2038889005878767761

item.title: Cuties AI platform suffers major data breach
item.description: summary: NSFW AI companion Cuties AI breached; 144k email addresses, prompts for AI adult images, and content URLs exposed publicly last week. 26% emails previously pwned. canonical_author: @haveibeenpwned source_classification: trusted_expert source_confidence: 100 source_reason: Have I Been Pwned run by Troy Hunt, globally trusted for accurate breach notifications and analysis. urgency_reason: Newly disclosed breach of sensitive user data from authoritative breach tracking service. vendors: Cuties AI products: Cuties AI related_sources: - https://x.com/haveibeenpwned/status/2038874122609115427

item.title: FortiClientEMS CVE-2026-21643 SQLi under active exploitation
item.description: summary: CVSS 9.8 SQL injection in FortiClient EMS 7.4.4 actively exploited; upgrade to 7.4.5 recommended; detection script shared. canonical_author: @rxerium source_classification: trusted_expert source_confidence: 90 source_reason: Recognized researcher with relevant credentials and history of sharing actionable vuln intel including detection tools. urgency_reason: Active in-the-wild exploitation of critical SQLi with technical details and mitigation provided. cve_ids: CVE-2026-21643 vendors: Fortinet products: FortiClient EMS related_sources: - https://x.com/rxerium/status/2038695719284936825

item.title: CISA adds Citrix NetScaler CVE-2026-3055 to KEV Catalog
item.description: summary: Out-of-bounds read vulnerability in Citrix NetScaler added to Known Exploited Vulnerabilities; federal patch required. canonical_author: @cisacyber source_classification: official source_confidence: 100 source_reason: Government agency directly responsible for tracking and mandating patches for exploited vulnerabilities. urgency_reason: KEV inclusion confirms active exploitation requiring immediate patching by U.S. federal agencies. cve_ids: CVE-2026-3055 vendors: Citrix products: NetScaler, NetScaler ADC, NetScaler Gateway related_sources: - https://x.com/cisacyber/status/2038695563709866279 - https://x.com/tweetthreatnews/status/2038889058391203906 - https://x.com/piyokango/status/2038894748384338241
